writer: Michael Berry, John Blumenthal, Stephen Carpenter
actors: Martin Lawrence, Luke Wilson, Peter Greene
plot: Miles Logan is a jewel thief who just hit the big time by stealing a huge diamond. However, after two years in jail, he comes to find out that he hid the diamond in a police building that was being built at the time of the robbery. In an attempt to regain his diamond, he poses as an L.A.P.D. detective...
